title: compat: endpoint `/build` must set header `content type` as `application/json` in response header.
body:
Lot of clients are expecting proper `Content-type: application/json`
configured in response headers of `/build` compat api. Following commit
fixes that.

Fixes issues where code is setting header field after writing header
which does not seems correct. We must set `content-type` before we write and flush
http header.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13148
